items.title: Wix: This Is Where I Will Put My Money Instead (Rating Downgrade)
items.description: Wix posted solid Q2 FY25 results, but AI disruption fears and weak revenue guidance cloud its outlook. Find out why WIX stock is downgraded to Hold.
